channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marilyn Gladu, Conservative MP for Sarnia, joins Liberal caucus
item.description: On April 8, 2026, Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu announced her decision to cross the floor to join the Liberal Party, becoming the fourth Conservative MP to do so in recent months. Gladu, who has repre...

item.title: Examining the Benefits and Challenges of Remote Work for Fuel Conservation
item.description: The ongoing fuel crisis, intensified by the Middle East conflict, has led countries worldwide to explore strategies for reducing fuel consumption. Some nations in Asia, including Indonesia, Malaysia, ...

item.title: Tiger Woods Seeks Rehab Following DUI Arrest Amid Chronic Pain Struggles
item.description: Tiger Woods, widely regarded as one of the greatest golfers of all time, is facing another setback in his personal and professional life following a recent car crash and DUI arrest. Woods, 50, has a h...

item.title: Naledi Pandor urges principled activism as new Chancellor of Nelson Mandela University
item.description: Naledi Pandor has officially taken up the role of Chancellor at Nelson Mandela University, calling on society to 'make good trouble' in line with Nelson Mandela’s principles. In her installation speec...

item.title: The Masters: A Celebration of Golf and Natural Beauty
item.description: The Masters golf tournament at Augusta National is renowned not only for its prestigious competition but also for its breathtaking natural beauty. The article highlights the meticulously curated lands...

item.title: Akpabio Say Senate Fully Support Tinubu Government During Lagos Inauguration
item.description: Senate President Godswill Akpabio don talk say the National Assembly stand full ground behind President Bola Tinubu. Akpabio yarn this one on Wednesday during the opening ceremony of some big Lagos pr...

item.title: Scientists Identify a Newly Formed Lunar Crater from a Recent Impact
item.description: A newly discovered crater on the Moon has revealed that our nearest celestial neighbor is still changing. Using images captured by the Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Camera, scientists compared photos t...

item.title: Congress candidate Suren Daimari resigns citing lack of support before Assam polls
item.description: Just a day ahead of the Assam Assembly elections, Congress faced a setback as its candidate for the Udalguri (ST) constituency, Suren Daimari, declared that he was quitting the party. Daimari said he ...

item.title: Oil Prices Fall Sharply After US-Iran Ceasefire Restores Calm in Global Markets
item.description: Oil wahala don calm down small as crude oil prices drop sharply wetin happen after America and Iran reach ceasefire agreement. On Wednesday, early trading show say global oil benchmark fall around 13%...

item.title: KCA University 2026 Fee Structure for Self-Sponsored Students: A Breakdown by Program

item.title: PSG hosts Liverpool in Champions League quarter-final first leg
item.description: Liverpool travel to Paris to face Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final, amid mounting pressure on head coach Arne Slot. Following a heavy FA Cup defeat to Manch...

item.title: eThekwini senior manager guilty of sexual misconduct remains employed despite investigation
item.description: A senior manager in eThekwini municipality’s expenditure and revenue unit has been found guilty of sexual misconduct but continues to hold his position and receive a salary, according to a report by t...

item.title: Israel agrees to U.S. ceasefire with Iran but keeps Lebanon campaign ongoing
item.description: Israel has announced its support for U.S. President Donald Trump’s decision to pause military strikes against Iran for two weeks, though it clarified that the ceasefire does not include Lebanon. Prime...

item.title: Baguio temporarily halts number coding to ease transport challenges
item.description: Baguio City Mayor Benjamin Magalong has temporarily suspended the city's number coding scheme to address transportation difficulties arising from the recent surge in fuel prices. This suspension, effe...

item.title: US and Iran Reach Ceasefire Following Trump-Shehbaz Talks
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have eased following discussions between US President Donald Trump and Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, along with the Chief of Defense Forces (CDF)...

item.title: Wizkid, Burna Boy, and DJ Tunez clash at Lagos event sparks talk of rivalry in Afrobeats scene
item.description: Wetin happen be say for one private event wey dem hold for Lagos on April 6, 2026, DJ Tunez, wey be Wizkid’s official DJ, and Burna Boy jam serious gbege. Dem say the matter start when DJ Tunez dey pl...

item.title: Regional participation boosts Tanzania National Swimming Championships
item.description: The 2026 National Swimming Championships, set for April 10–12 at the International School of Tanganyika in Dar es Salaam, will feature 16 clubs—14 from across Tanzania and two from neighbouring countr...

item.title: PM Shehbaz highlights Pakistan's diplomatic role in securing temporary US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: On Wednesday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif expressed that Pakistan has gained significant respect globally following its successful mediation in the recent US-Iran conflict. After six weeks of warfar...

item.title: Man Sentenced for Deliberate Gas Explosion That Destroyed Multiple Homes
item.description: Paul Solway, 58, was sentenced to 11 years in prison for causing a massive explosion in Alvaston, Derby, after cutting a gas pipe and setting fire to a chair during a personal dispute. The incident, w...
